mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 075 > locations > First taken to Satalice_ then transferred to Skandia
mechanics.excerpt: First taken to Satalice_ then transferred to Skandia you were finally evacuated to the world of Karbala in early 3052 before the arrival of forces from Clan Wolf'$ Gamma Galaxy: On Karbala, you scrounged the best living you could on the streets Though you knew how deeply SO many of your fellow countrymen hated merce naries, you had burning desire to strike back at the Clans_ and you realized that being adopted into mercenary unit was the only way someone like you could hope to fight them.
